_comment: Curated explainer map for common Drupal 9/10 -> 11 deprecations, consumed by scripts/analysis/explain-deprecations.sh. Each entry: 'pattern' is a case-insensitive ERE matched against a deprecation/Rector line; 'symbol' keys a deterministic drupal.org change-records SEARCH url (we NEVER hardcode a change-record node id, so the link is always correct); 'why' is the one-line human explanation; 'fix' is the modern replacement. Add entries freely — this is a best-effort teaching aid, not an exhaustive list.

deprecations.fix: Use EntityTypeManagerInterface (and the dedicated repository/field managers).
Inject the 'database' connection service and use its query builders.

deprecations.why: Static \Drupal:: service access is discouraged (and brittle to test).

deprecations.fix: Use the 'spaceless' filter via {% apply spaceless %} ... {% endapply %}, or explicit whitespace control.

deprecations.why: jQuery UI libraries removed from core.
deprecations.fix: Replace with a native/JS alternative or the contrib jquery_ui_* shims; re-evaluate the UI in Phase 2.

deprecations.why: CKEditor 4 removed; CKEditor 5 is the only core editor.
deprecations.fix: Migrate the editor config/plugins to CKEditor 5 (often non-mechanical — consider Phase 2).
Use native assert() with class type-hints, or proper type declarations.

deprecations.why: Legacy PHPUnit mock APIs removed in PHPUnit 10/11.
deprecations.fix: Use createMock()/createStub() and the modern matcher API; remove at().

deprecations.why: Forms/controllers should inject services, not call \Drupal:: statically.
deprecations.fix: Implement create() and inject the services you need.

deprecations.why: Update path semantics matter for a port.
deprecations.fix: Keep existing hook_update_N intact; do not renumber. Add new ones only for real schema/config changes.
